title: Implement tsk dep tree in Python
description: Implement tree display with ASCII art. Support --format flag.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Implemented Python dependency tree rendering with text/json/dot formats, depth limit, and truncation; wired tsk dep tree CLI; added tests and updated dependency tree Gherkin. Tests: python -m pytest python/tests/test_dependency_tree.py python/tests/test_cli.py, python -m pytest --cov=taskulus --cov-report=term-missing python/tests, black python/src/taskulus/dependency_tree.py python/src/taskulus/cli.py python/tests/test_dependency_tree.py python/tests/test_cli.py, ruff check python/src/taskulus/dependency_tree.py python/src/taskulus/cli.py python/tests/test_dependency_tree.py python/tests/test_cli.py.
